title: The Briefing: Financial Services
summary: Anthropic reports that some of the world's largest banks are now deploying Claude across their organizations. The company hosted a briefing event where leaders shared their implementations and use cases in the financial services sector.
writeup: This video covers The Briefing: Financial Services, an Anthropic event where banking leaders discussed how their organizations deploy Claude. It matters because large banks are adopting LLMs across their operations, a signal of enterprise uptake in a regulated industry. The key takeaway is the presence of concrete implementations and use cases described by the institutions putting Claude to work.
